calendar.matters:
Petition For Modification Of Trust For Merger Of The Bypass Trust Into Survivor'S Trust; Memorandum Of Points And Authority In Support Of Petition
Off Calendar Dec-08-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mary Sancimino, via CourtCall, for Wallace Woo and Joseph Woo, Successor co-Trustees.

The court advises counsel that its tentative ruling is to grant the petition as to modification but that the request regarding the merger relating back to Nov-22-2019 is being denied. Ms. Sancimino offers advocacy to convince the court to grant the request regarding the merger. The court confirms its tentative ruling, and the order is signed in open court.

Judge: Hon. Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Modification Of Trust For Merger Of The Bypass Trust Into Survivor'S Trust; Memorandum Of Points And Authority In Support Of Petition
Off Calendar Oct-27-2021 Continued To Dec-08-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney Mary Giselle Sancimino to appear on Dec-08-2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear. The Petition for Modification of Trust, etc., is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

***After the hearing, the court cancelled issuing the Order to Appear on its own motion.
